'''Pal-Han-Das''' was a tough, young [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] [[Noble/Legends|noble]] and a member of [[Mynnic]]'s band of adventurers around [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. He wore robes and trappings that signified his rank in Cerean society. He was the intellectual and tactician of the band, but didn't mind getting his hands dirty. He wielded a [[Sporting blaster/Legends|sporting blaster]].<ref name="Joe" />

{{Char-stub}}
